steps.title: Find the defining claim
steps.content: The notes explain that minerals with larger numbers are harder than minerals with smaller numbers and can leave visible scratches on them. This sentence gives the direct link between a higher Mohs number and the ability to scratch a lower‑numbered mineral.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
Choice B captures the rule exactly: it says any mineral with a Mohs number of 7, like quartz, can scratch a mineral with a Mohs number of 5, like apatite.
The other choices either give only specific examples without stating the general principle, reverse the cause‑effect relationship, or introduce an idea not mentioned in the notes.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
